ety: inf. n. ii of شوش, which is not in use
def: s.f. Confusion; perplexity, distraction; grief, care, anxiety, disquietude, alarm, apprehension.
n. f. A. شوش became perplexed. Confusion.
more: (inf. ii. of شوش) s. f. 1. Confusion. 2. Distraction. 3. Anxiety, grief, disquietude, alarm, apprehension.

ety: inf. n. ii of اثر
def: s.f. The making an impression; impression, effect; operation; penetration (see as̤ar)
more: n. f. ائو he made an incision in the foot of the camel. Effect. See اثر (1). tāsīr-i-qānūn . The effect of law. tāsīr karnā , v. n. See asar karnā . To make an impression; to influence; prevail upon. tāsīr kam karnā , v. a. To lessen the efficacy of.
(inf. ii. of اثر) s. f. The making an impression, effect, impression, operation, penetration. Plur. تاثيرات tās̤īrāt, Impressions, effects.
subs: (-meṅ, or par), To make an impression (on), take effect (on), to influence
(-kī), To diminish the effect or the efficacy (of)
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَأْثِیر (ta'sīr), borrowed from Arabic تَأْثِير (taʔṯīr), from أَثَّرَ (ʔaṯṯara). First attested in c. 1611 as Middle Hindi تاثیر (tas̱yr /⁠tāsīr⁠/).

ety: caus. of ṭasaknā
def: v.t. To cause to move, to move, shake, stir; to cause to throb or pain; — v.n. To shoot or throb with pain ( = ṭasaknā).
s.m. A thief, robber; — a kind of pot-herb, Trigonella corniculata; the tree Vangueria spinosa.
more: s. m. A stealer, a thief, a robber.

def: s.f. = S تسکرتو तस्करत्व taskaratva, s.m. Thievishness, thieving, theft.
s.m. = S تسکرتا तस्करता taskaratā, s.f. Thievishness, thieving, theft.
s.f. Theft, robbery; — a passionate woman.

ety: inf. n. ii of سخر
def: s.f. Subduing, conquering, taking (a stronghold or prisoners), imprisoning, captivating; making submissive, obedient, or tractable; subjugation, subjection; capture; captivation; imprisonment (of evil spirits)
more: n. f. سخر he brought him under. 1. Taking a stronghold; capture; captivation; subjugation. 2. The capture, subjugation or imprisonment of an evil spirit. 3. Sorcery; enchantment; magic.
(inf. ii. of سخر) s. f. Imprisoning, taking a strong hold, subduing, captivating, capture, subjection, subjugation. تسخير قلوب taṣḵẖīr-i-ḳulūb, Captivating of hearts.

ety: inf. n. ii of سکن 'to be in a state of rest'
def: s.f. Calming, stilling, tranquillizing, appeasing, soothing, allaying, assuaging; consolation, comfort, mitigation, rest, assurance, peace (of mind)
more: n. f. A. سکن it was allayed. Satisfaction; comfort. See تسلي taskīn denā , v. a. To appease; pacify; soothe; assuage; console; comfort. taskīn honā , v. n. To be satisfied, consoled.

(inf. ii. of سکن Heb. Was quiet, remained) s. f. Consolation, comfort, pacifying, soothing, assuaging, appeasing, mitigation. تسکين دينا taskīn denā, To appease, to pacify, to sooth, to calm, to assuage. تسکين بخش taskīn-baḵẖsh, adj. Assuasive, mitigating, consolatory; an anodyne.
subs: adj. Assuasive, mitigating, allaying; consolatory; — s.m. An anodyne
(-ko), To calm, tranquillize, appease, soothe, allay, assuage, console, comfort
v.n. To derive comfort, &c. (from), to be appeased, be consoled or comforted.

ety: S. तष्ट, rt. तक्ष् or त्वष्ट rt. त्वक्ष्+Prk. अडओ = S. र or ल+कः; cf. P. tasht
def: s.m. A brass dish or vessel (used by Hindus to knead dough in, or to dress their victuals).
more: n. m. A brass dish used as a kneading trough. Hin. 1. Tasalvā tor, kī mor? Prov. Is this vessel yours or mine? (Your money or your life). 2. Piyā pardes man gājat hoiheṅ! Chuttar uṭhā chūlhā phūkat hoiheṅ! Taslā maṅjait gāṅṛ phāṭat hoiheṅ! Bhoj. My husband far away enjoys himself no doubt, How he must like to blow the fire, head down, bum out! To gobble down his dāl and rice is oh! so nice! But scrubbing pans! Oh wont his a—crack in a trice.
s. m. A vessel used by Hindūs to dress their victuals.

ety: inf. n. ii of صلب; — formed from صليب 'a cross'
def: s.f. Crucifying, crucifixion; making the sign of the cross; the figuring of a cross or crosses (upon a garment, &c.).
more: (inf. ii. of صلب) s. f. Crucifixion.

ety: inf. n. ii of سلم 'to be or become safe'
def: s.f. Saluting, greeting; salutation, obeisance, homage, touching the ground with the fingers and then making salām; health, security; delivering, consigning; committing to the care of; surrender, resignation; conceding, acknowledging, granting; assenting to, accepting
more: n. f. سلم he was safe. 1. Salutation; greeting; compliment. 2. Taking for granted (H. انگيکار 1.); admission. taslīm k . v. n. 1. ( taslīm arz k .) To salute; make obeisance; to do homage. 2. To admit or grant for the sake of argument ( aṅgīkār k . 1, 2.). taslīm na karnā , v. a. To object; deny; reject.

(inf. ii. of سلم) s. f. 1. Delivery, consignment, cession, surrender, resignation. 2. Recommending to the care or protection of another. 3. Saluting most respectfully, homage, obeisance. 4. Health, security. (Plur. تسليمات taslīmāt ). تسليمات بجالانا taslīmāt ba-jā lānā, To make obeisances. تسليم کرنا taslīm karnā, To resign, surrender, cede, commit, consign: to salute (most respectfully), to make obeisance, to homage, to do homage. تسليم هونا taslīm honā, To be resigned or committed.
s. f. Touching the ground with the fingers and then making salām (Qanoon-e-islam).
subs: v.t. To salute respectfully, make obeisance, do homage; to deliver, commit to, consign; to surrender, resign; to concede, acknowledge, grant; to assent to, to accept
v.n. To be committed or consigned (to); to be resigned; to be conceded; to be accepted.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تسلیم (taslīm), from Arabic تَسْلِيم (taslīm).

ety: of taslīm
def: v.n. To make obeisances, to salute; to bid adieu, take leave (of a superior).

ety: inf. n. ii of ثلث 'to become the third,' &c.
def: s.f. Making three, dividing into three parts; triad, trinity; a trine (the aspect of the planets)
more: n. f. ثلث Three. 1. Dividing into three parts. 2. Triad; trinity. 3. A trine (the aspect of the planets).
(inf. ii. of ثلث Heb. Three) s. f. 1. Trinity. 2. Dividing into three parts. 3. A trine (the aspect of the planets).

def: s.m. A thong; a strap of leather; a leathern belt; stirrup-leather
more: n. m. A thong; a strap of leather. tasmā lagā' na rakhnā , v. n. lit . not to leave a single tendon. 1. To kill outright; cut in two. 2. To divide or separate two persons completely.
s. m. A thong, a strap of leather. تسمه کهينچنا tasma khaiṅchnā, To strangle. تسمه کش tasma-kash, A strangler, a mute.
subs: (-kā, and -par), To tighten a strap, &c.; to strangle
v.n. lit. 'Not to leave a piece of skin attached'; to sever completely, cut in two, to kill outright; to produce complete separation or estrangement (between two persons).
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تسمه, from Ancient Greek δεσμός (desmós).

def: n. f. A low gambling game played with a leather strap and a stick.
n. f. A mess of boiled milk and rice ( khīr ).

ety: abl. sing. of the pron. tad
def: conj. From that, on that account, therefore.

ety: inf. n. ii of صم 'to strike,' &c.
def: s.f. Holding firmly to (an opin on, &c.); determination, resolve.
more: (inf. ii. of صمّ) s. f. Resolve, determination.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَصْمِیم (tasmīm), from Arabic verbal noun تَصْمِيم (taṣmīm).

ety: for A. تسمية tasmiyat, fem., inf. n. ii of سمو 'to be high,' &c.
def: s.m. Naming, calling, giving a name to, nomination; pronouncing the name of God, saying bismiʼllāh, 'in the name of God' (over a thing, such as food, or an animal about to be slaughtered).
more: (inf. ii. of سمو or سمي) s. m. Nomination, giving a name to.
The bismi-l-lāh, &c. (used by Muhammadans as an inchoative benediction).

def: v.n. To burst, as anything too tight, &c.), to split, crack; to part, be sundered, become estranged or unfriendly.
more: v. n. To burst (as, tight cloth or a pillow stuffed too full), to split, to crack.

def: s. See ستياناس satyānās.

ety: inf. n. ii of صنف not in use
def: s.f. Compiling, composing (a book); invention; literary composition
more: n. f. A. صنف formed A composition; an original work. haq-i-tasnīf , n. f. Copyright.
(inf. ii. of صنف) s. f. Invention, composition, writing (of a book, &c.). (Plur. تصنيفات or تصانيف). تصنيف کرنا taṣnīf karnā, To compose, write (a book, &c.).
subs: v.t. To compose, to write (a book, &c.).

def: s.f. pl. (of taṣnīf), Literary compositions, writings, works ( = taṣānīf).

ety: inf. n. ii of سنم 'to raise,' &c.
def: s.f. The name of a water or fountain in Paradise (so called because running above the elevated chambers and the pavilions; see the Qor. lxxxiii. 27).
more: (from سنم) s. A water or fountain of paradise.

ety: for A. تثنية tas̤niyat, fem.; inf. n. ii of ثني 'to double'
def: adj. Marked with two points (the letter t or y); dual (number).
more: n. m. ثني he doubled it. Used adjectively. The dual (number).
(inf. ii. of ثني) s. m. used adjectively, The dual (number).

ety: inf. n. ii of صرف 'to turn, to change,' &c.
def: s.f. Turning, changing, converting; (in Gram.) inflection, declension, conjugation
more: n. f. صرف changing. ( Gram .) Conjugation; declension; inflection.
(inf. ii. of صرف) s. f. 1. Conjugation, declension, inflection (in grammar). 2. Changing, turning, converting. تصريف کرنا taṣrīf karnā, To conjugate, decline, inflect (in grammar).
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَصْرِیف (tasrīf), from Arabic تَصْرِيف (taṣrīf).

ety: inf. n. ii of صرح 'to become pure, or clear,' &c.
def: s.f. Making clear; declaring; manifestation; evidence; explanation; narration (cf. tashrīḥ).
more: n. f. صرح became clear. See تشريح (1, 2).
(inf. ii. of صرح) s. f. Evidence, manifestation, explanation, narration.

def: n. m. اسف he grieved. See افسوس
more: (inf. v. of اسف) s. m. Brooding over affliction, pining, lamenting, grief, regret, remorse. تاسف کرنا taʼassuf karnā, To grieve, lament, pine, regret (over).

def: s.m. = next, q.v.
more: s. A bowl or large cup.

ety: inf. n. ii of سطر 'to write,' &c.
def: s.f. Writing; ruling (lines); delineating.
more: (inf. ii. of سطر) s. f. Delineating, writing.

def: s.m. A measure of length, the twenty-fourth part of a gaz, or the breadth of the second and third fingers; an inch.
more: n. m. ( Workmen ) 1/24 of a yard.

def: tā-su, Of him, that or it.
s.m. pl. Tears; false or hypocritical tears.
Wom. n. m. False tears; crocodile tears. ṭasve bahā'nā , Wom. v. n. To pretend to weep. Kis ne ḍālā hai, zanākhī, zor, mat tasve bahā, Kyā burī khū hai terī, dar gor, mat tasve bahā! Wom. Rangīṅ.

ety: inf. n. ii of سود; prob. a denom. from sawād
def: s.f. Making black, blackening; first draught, original copy, rough draft (of a letter, &c.); sketch, plan, delineation.
more: (inf. ii. of سواد) s. f. 1. Making black. 2. The draught of a letter, &c., a rough copy, a sketch, a plan, delineation.

ety: inf. n. ii of صور 'to form,' &c.
def: s.f. Picture; drawing; sketch; painting; portrait; an image
more: n. f. صور pictured. A picture; Rahtī hai tasvīr sanam kī basī hamārī āṅkhoṅ meṅ. Jādū hai yā mohnī sanam tumhārī āṅkhoṅ meṅ. tasvīr , adj. Handsome; beautiful; graceful. raṅg-dār tasvīr , n. f. A painting. sādī tasvīr , n. f. A drawing; sketch; likeness. aksī tasvīr ; H. dhūp-mūrat , n. f. A photograph.

(inf. ii. of صورت) s. f. A picture, portrait, an image. تصويرخانه taṣwīr-khāna, A picture-gallery. تصويربنانا or تصويرکهينچنا taṣwīr banānā or taṣwīr khaiṅchnā, To draw, &c. to paint. (Arab. plur. تصويرات).
subs: (-kī), To make a drawing, or picture, &c. (of); to draw; to paint
s.f. A coloured picture, a painting
s.f. An uncoloured picture; a drawing, a sketch
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَصْوِیر (taswīr), borrowed from Arabic تَصْوِير (taṣwīr), from صَوَّرَ (ṣawwara). First attested in c. 1500 as Middle Hindi تَصْوِیر (tṣvyr).

def: s.f. pl. (of taṣwīr), Pictures; drawings, paintings, &c. ( = taṣāwīr).

ety: S. त्रात्र; or तन्त्रीः; cf. ṭaṭṭī
def: s.f. Sackcloth, canvass; a mat; the piece of sacking or carpet on which a banker sits; — the green pod of chick-pea or 'gram'
more: s. m. Canvass, sackcloth. ٿاٿ باف ṭāṭ-bāf, s. m. A weaver of canvass. ٿاٿ بافي ṭāṭ-bāf-ī, s. f. Embroidery.
subs: v.n. 'The (banker's or merchant's) ṭāṭ to be turned over'; (fig.) to become bankrupt
s.m. A weaver of canvass or sacking
adj. Embroidered, worked with gold or silver (shoes); — s.f. Embroidery; a shoe worked with gold or silver (syn. tār-bāfī, of which it is said to be a corruption).

def: s. (dakh.) Sackcloth ( Harris ): see تاٿ ṭāṭ.

ety: for tad
def: pron. That; his, &c. (occurring only in comp.)
more: n. m. S. तत्व 1. The essential principle; essence; element. 2. Pith; marrow; substance. 3. Moral; result ( natījah ); fruit. 4. The real nature of the soul considered as one with the divine spirit. bastu-tat-biddyā ; A. kīmyā , n. f. Chemistry.
s. m. An element, a principle, the essence.
subs: adj. & s.m. Having that as one's highest object or aim, totally devoted or addicted (to), attending closely (to), eagerly engaged (in), intent (on); — one who is eagerly engaged (in), or intent (on), &c.; an adept, &c.

s.m. (in Gram.) A class of compounds or samās in which the last member is determined or qualified by the first without losing its original independence (the word tat-purush, 'his man,' is itself an example of this class of compounds)

tat-tad, adj. This and that; this or that; different, various; — tat-tad-avatār, s.m. This or that incarnation; different or various incarnations; — tat-tad-vyavahār, s.m. Different kinds of behaviour; different or varions customs, &c.; — tat-tad-dharm, s.m. This or that religion; different religions

s.m. This or that country, &c.; — tat-tat-sthān, s.m. This or that place, &c.; tat-tat-karma, s.m. This or that act; different or various acts, different kinds of business; — tat-tal-lok (tal for tad), s.m. Different kinds of people
s.f. That caste; — tat-jātyućit (tat+jāti+ućit), s.m. Whatever rightly pertains to that caste

tat-kāl, s.m. & adv. That time; present time, time being, the time referred to or spoken of, the same time, the time when an act occurs; — at that time, then; at a certain time; directly, immediately, forthwith; — tat-kāla-dhī, adj. & s.m. Wise or intelligent for the time being; having presence of mind; — one who has presence of mind, &c.
s.m. & adv. Time present, time being; the same moment; — at the same moment, that instant, immediately, forthwith

ety: Prk. तत्तो and तत्तओ; S. तप्तः and तप्त+कः, part. of rt. तप्
def: adj Heated, warmed; hot, warm; heating (cf. tattā).
more: n. m. 1. Canvass. Damṛī kī nahārī meṅ ṭāṭ ke ṭukṛe . Prov. The soup you will for a farthing get is a shred of canvass in some water set. 2. The mat or carpet on which a banker sits. 3. The capsular pod of green gram. ṭāṭ yā tappaṛ ulaṭnā , v. n. lit . To be turned over (the ṭāṭ ). To be, become, or be declared a bankrupt; to be posted in the Gazette.
1. ( तात ) s. m. Father. 2. ( तप्त ) adj. Hot, warm.

def: n. m. Beating time (in music or dancing).
adj. & s.m. Revered, respected; venerable; dear; — father; a term of affection or endearment addressed to any person (esp. to a junior or inferior, as to a child or pupil); — intj. My dear!
more: n. f. P. tābīdan to shine, S. तप. 1. Light; refulgence; splendour. 2. Power; endurance; toleration. tāb lānā , v. n. To bear; endure; to be able to bear.
subs: tāt-mātu, s.m. Father and mother, parents.

ety: Prk. तत्तो and तत्तओ; S. तप्तः and तप्त+कः, part. of rt. तप्
def: adj Heated, warmed; hot, warm; heating (cf. tattā).
s.m. Father ( = tāt, tāʼū).
s.m. Slope, declivity; the horizon (as appearing to slope); bank (of a river), shore, coast; a field
more: s. m. A shore or bank.
s. (dakh.) Walls or fortifications of a town.
subs: adj. & s.m. Situated on a declivity, or on a bank, &c.; — indifferent; — an indifferent person, one neither a friend nor a foe.

ety: inf. n. v of تبع 'to follow'
def: s.m. Pursuing, following (after), hunting (after), searching diligently (for); investigating; exploring; imitating; imitation; continuation
more: n. m. تبع he followed. Following; imitation.
(inf. v. of تبع Chald. He followed) s. m. 1. Following, imitation. 2. Continuation. تتبع کرنا tatabbuﻌ karnā, To search diligently, to explore, to examine, to follow, to imitate, ape, mimick.

ety: inf. n. vi of طبق 'to stick to,' &c.
def: s.m. Conformity, correspondence, congruity, agreement, concurrence, similarity, analogy; coherence, cohesion.
more: (inf. vi. of طبق) s. m. Similarity, congruity, concurrence, analogy, coherence, cohesion.

def: s. m. A vessel for warming water, a kettle.

ety: S. तप्त+कार+कः or इका
def: A vessel for warming water, a kettle.

ety: S. तप्त+कार+कः or इका
def: A vessel for warming water, a kettle.
s. f. A vessel for warming water, a kettle.

ety: S. तप्त+कार+कः or इका
def: A vessel for warming water, a kettle.
n. m. From H. tattā hot. A vessel for warming water.
conj. = tathaiva, q.v.s.v. tathā. s.f. Ability, power, might.
n. m. A wasp ( bhiṛ ).
adj. = ṭaṭkā, q.v. adj. (f. -ī), Fresh, new, recent.

ety: S. तन्त्रकः
def: s.m. Juggling; a charm ( = ṭoṭkā).
v.n. = ṭhiṭhaknā, q.v. v.n. To stand still, to stagnate; to stop short or suddenly, to stand amazed or staggered; to draw back in surprise, to shrink, to hesitate, to boggle
subs: ṭhiṭhak-rahnā or rah-jānā, v.n. To stop short, &c. = ṭhiṭhaknā.

ety: S. तातलः
def: adj. Hot, warm heating (prob. a Prk. form; cf. tāt).

ety: tattā, q.v.+ā = āw = Prk. आवे = S. आपि caus. augment+nā = Prk. अणअं = S. अनीयं
def: v.t. To heat, to warm (cf. tatārnā).
more: E. v. n. 1. To be dried. 2. To ache; pain (the joints). Age! āj hamar deh ṭaṭāit bā, tanī tel le-ke ṭaghrā de . Bhoj. My dear, my body aches to-day, rub me down with some oil.

ety: fr. S. तप्त, rt. तप्
def: v.n. (prov.) To be dried; — to pain, ache (the body or limbs).
s.m. An ornament for the ear, a large sort of ear-ring ( = tāṛaṅk).
more: s. m. An ornament worn in the ear.

def: s.m. A Tartar; the Tartars; — Tartary.

ety: S. तप्त+कारी
def: s.f. Embrocation; fomentation; pouring warm water (on a diseased part); applying hot flannel or cloth (to a seat of pain; syn. seṅk); bathing or moistening (an inflamed part) with cold water (syn. taṛaiṛā); pouring cold water on (an intoxicated person).
s.m. contrac. of tātār, q.v.
more: n. f. Pouring warm or cold water on an inflamed part or cold water on an intoxicated person.
s. m. The same as تاتار q. v.
s. f. Embrocation, pouring of warm water on a diseased part.

def: adj. Of or belonging to Tartary; Tartaric, Scythian; — s.m.f. An agreeable friend; — s.f. A kind of slashed doublet open at the sides (usually worn by the Tartars); fine musk.
adj. = tātārī, q.v. adj. Of or belonging to Tartary; Tartaric, Scythian; — s.m.f. An agreeable friend; — s.f. A kind of slashed doublet open at the sides (usually worn by the Tartars); fine musk.
n. f. Heat (of the sun); hot winds. Khetī ko tatāṛī mār dīā . The great heat of the sun has killed the crop.

ety: see tatār
def: s.f. Heat (of the sun, &c.), fierce heat; hot winds.

ety: see tatār
def: s.f. Heat (of the sun, &c.), fierce heat; hot winds.

ety: see tatār
def: v.t. To embrocate, foment, &c. (see tatār).

ety: tātā = S. तत्त्व+ कः+thāʼī = thāpī = thāp, q.v.+S. इका
def: s.f. Beating time (in music or dancing).

ety: tātā = S. तत्त्व+ कः+thāʼī = thāpī = thāp, q.v.+S. इका
def: s.f. Beating time (in music or dancing).

ety: inf. n. vi of طول 'to be extended,' &c.
def: s.m. Exalting oneself; haughtiness, insolence, rudeness; oppression, tyranny; usurpation; conquest, extension of dominion.
more: (inf. vi. of طول) s. m. Usurpation, tyranny, conquest, rudeness, insolence.

ety: inf. n. v of طوع 'to be ome submissive,' &c.
def: s.m. Doing a thing without its being incumbent or obligatory on one; an act of supererogation.
n. f. Cor. of tār bāfī . 1. Embroidery. 2. A shoe worked with gold or silver.

ety: inf. n. ii of طبق; but formed prob. from t̤abaq, 'a cover'
def: s.f. Comparing; likening; putting (two things) together face to face; causing to confront, drawing up in a line (as two armies).
more: (inf. ii. of طبق) s. f. 1. Comparing, likening. 2. Drawing up in line, or making to confront (as, two armies).

def: adv. At that instant, instantly, immediately.
s.m. = tatahrā, q.v. A vessel for warming water, a kettle.

ety: S. तथ्यः
def: adj. 'Being really so,' true, real, genuine; right; perfect.
s.f. Ability, power, might.
more: n. f. Might; power; ability. tathā , adj. The same; like ( waisā ).
( तथा ) s. f. Power, ability, might.

s. f. The price for weighing.

def: v.t. = tulwānā, q.v. v.t. To have (a thing) weighed, &c. = tulānā, q.v. v.t. To cause to be weighed, to have or get (a thing) weighed, valued, &c. ( = taulānā, tulwānā).
more: (caus. of تولنا) v. a. To cause to be weighed.

ety: S. ताम्रिका
def: s.f. A vessel used by Hindūs (orig. applied to a copper vessel, syn. with tambiyā; but now also applied to an earthen vessel).
more: s. f. A vessel used by Hindūs.

ety: inf. n. ii of ولد 'to bear children'
def: s.f. Procreating, begetting; assisting at a birth, doing the work of a midwife; generation, birth; production; growth.
more: (inf. ii. of ولد) s. f. Birth, generation.

ety: corr. from the English
def: s.m. A towel.

ety: S. ताम्रिका
def: s.f. A vessel used by Hindūs (orig. applied to a copper vessel, syn. with tambiyā; but now also applied to an earthen vessel).
more: s. m. A vessel used by Hindūs.

ety: for A. تولية, inf. n. ii of ولي 'to assist; to govern'
def: s.f. Appointing (one) as governor, deputy, or superintendent; setting over; the superintendence (of any business); trusteeship
more: (inf. ii. of ولي) s. f. Superintendence (of any business).
subs: s.m. Letter or order appointing one a superintendent, &c.; deed of trusteeship.

def: s.f. = tulwāʼī, q.v. s.f. The act o weighing; price paid for having (a thing) weighed, weighment fee.
s. f. The price of weighing.

ety: Ap. Prk. तेवडु, Prk. तेद्दहो; S. तावत्
def: pron. correl. (of jaun), He, she, it, that, that same ( = so).

ety: v.n. fr. طعن; see t̤āʻin, and t̤aʻn
def: s.m. An epidemic, a plague, pestilence.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian طاعُون (tā'ūn), from Arabic طَاعُون (ṭāʕūn).

def: Wom. n. f. Cont. of tū hī nārī . A good housewife (used ironically). Tū baṛī taunālī āī! Wom.

ety: S. तपुस्
def: s.f. Heat of the sun; heat; great thirst.
more: n. f. S. तृषा thirst. Great thirst. Lūoṅ meṅ mat phir, tauṅs ho jāëgī! Wom.

def: s.f. = tauṅs, q.v. s.f. Heat of the sun; heat; great thirst.
s.m. Sun-stroke.
v.n. To be heated in the sun: to be overcome by heat, to be faint or languid with heat; to be parched; to droop, fade, wither; to be very thirsty.
more: v. n. 1. To be languid or overcome with heat. 2. To wither; droop; fade. 3. To be very thirsty.
v. n. To be affected or overcome with heat.

ety: v.n. fr. طور 'to hover round'
def: s.m. State, condition, quality; kind, sort; manner, mode, way; conduct, demeanour
more: n. m. See bhāṅṭ , 2, and chāl , 5. 1. Conduct; bearing; demeanour. 2. Condition ( tarah , 3). taur be-taur h. , v. n. 1. To be badly treated. 2. To be in a bad way, or on the point of death. taur tarīqah , n. m. 1. Ways; manner; deportment ( taur , 1, & chāl , 6). 2. Practice; manner of dealing ( chāl , 5). ba-taur-i-rasadī , adv. Rateably; in proportion; share and share alike. ba-taur-i-māmūl . Regularly; as usual; as established by custom. ba-taur-i-muqābilah , adj. Comparative; by way of comparison. ba-taur-i-muqaddamah . As a preamble; introductory; prefatory. gulām ke taur par kharīdnā . G. G. Buying as a slave.
s. m. 1. Mode, manner, fashion, way. 2. Condition, state. ¶ t̤ūr, A mountain; ( met. ) Sinai.
subs: v.n. To be in a bad way, or in a wretched condition; to be at the point of death; to be badly treated
s.m. Way of acting, manner, deportment; practice, habit, manner of dealing
adv. In the way, or by way (of); as (e.g. ba-t̤auṛ-ě-māmūl, as usual, regularly, &c.)
In his (or her, or their, &c.) own way; of itself, of himself, of themselves; personally.
wety: Borrowed from Arabic طُور (ṭūr).

def: s.f. = tauret, q.v. s.f. The Pentateuch; the Old Testament.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَوْرَات (tawrāt), from Arabic تَوْرَاة (tawrāh).

ety: for A. tauṛāt
def: s.f. The Pentateuch; the Old Testament.
more: s. f. The pentateuch, the old testament.

ety: prop. طاؤوس, fr. طوس 'to be beautiful'; cf. Ch. טום; and Gr. ταὼς
def: s.m. A peacock.
more: (Ch. Gr. Ταὼς ) s. m. A peacock.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian طَاوُوس (tāwūs), borrowed from Arabic طَاوُوس (ṭāwūs).

def: s.m. A young unbroken horse; a high-blooded, noble steed, war-horse, charger, steed, horse; a plump horse; a hard-mouthed or unmanageable horse.
more: s. m. 1. A horse. 2. A young unbroken horse. 3. A high blooded, noble steed, a war-horse. 4. A plump horse. 5. A horse with a hard mouth or unmanageable.

ety: inf. n. ii of وشح; but derived from wishāḥ 'a belt or girdle'
def: s.f. Putting a belt or girdle (on); adorning; arranging verses so that the initials of the lines being put together may form some word or verse; an acrostic.
more: (inf. ii. of وشاح) s. Putting on the girdle called وشاح; (in poetry) arranging the verses so that the initials of the lines being put together may form some word or verse.

ety: fr. t̤āʼūs
def: adj. Of or relating to the peacock; adorned with peacock's feathers, or with jewels, &c. to resemble a peacock's tail (as a throne); — s.f. A kind of ornamental handwriting.

ety: inf. n. ii of وصف 'to describe,' &c.
def: s.f. Describing; qualifying, description; commendation; a qualified substantive (in Gram.).
more: (inf. ii. of وصف) s. f. Description, commendation.

ety: inf. n. ii of وزع 'to check; to bring together'
def: s.f. A paper in which the different separate payments made by a zamindār, &c. are entered; statement, account; rent-roll; descriptive roll.
more: n. f. وزع shaped. A statement; account; rent roll; descriptive roll.

ety: inf. n. ii of وضع 'to place or lay down'
def: s.f. Putting down; depressing; humbling, lowering.

ety: inf. n. ii of وضح 'to be clear, evident,' &c.
def: s.f. Making clear or evident; manifestation; illustrating; publishing; statement, account of collections ( = tauzīʻ).
more: (inf. ii. of وضوح) s. f. Manifestation; statement, account of collections.

def: s.m. = tawā, q.v.
adj. Thy, thine ( = terā: com. in H. poetry).
more: adv. Then, that time, in that case, moreover, that, also, for, yes, well. توبهي tau bhī or to bhī, adv. Even then; still, yet, nevertheless. تولون يا تولگ tau loṅ or tau lag, adv. Then, in that case, till then, so long.
ex: اے خدا تو ہی میرا مددگار ہے!
ai xudā tū-hī merā madadgār hai!
O God, only Thou art my helper!
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Apabhramsa तुहुं (tuhũ), from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀢𑀼𑀫𑀁 (tumaṃ), 𑀢𑀼𑀁 (tuṃ), from Sanskrit त्वम् (tvam).

ety: S. तापकः; cf. tāwā, & the P. tāba
def: s.m. An iron plate or pan on which break-cakes are baked, a griddle; a frying-pan; the small plate or shard in a ćilam on which the tobacco is placed; a shard placed over the tobacco in the ćilam; a leaden pan let down into a well to cool the water, or to check excessive flow; — bottom, or bed (of a river, &c.); layer, stratum; an iron mirror
more: n. m. S. तप् to heat, P. tābah . 1. An iron pan on which bread is baked; a griddle. 1. Āṅkhoṅ meṅ kājal kyā ḍālā, bhaṭyārī kā tavā hī lūṭ līyā. Phabtī . Chaff. Pencilled her eyes with lamp black, do you say? Inn-keeper's griddle she has plundered, nay! 2. Tave kī terī, tāī kī merī . Prov. The baked cake on the pan for thee, the dough in kneading trough for me. 2. A leaden pan let down in a well for cooling the water or to check excessive flow. Is kueṅ meṅ tavā ḍalvā do . 3. A shard placed over the tobacco in the chilam . 4. Layer; stratum; bottom; bed. Daryā kā tavā ṭūṭ gayā . The bed of the river has sunk. (It cannot be sounded). tave par kī būṅd , adj. lit . a drop on a baking pan. 1. Trifling; small; petty. 2. Transient; fleeting. tavā sir se bāṅdhnā , v. n. To fortify oneself; to prepare to ward a blow. tavā haṅsnā , Wom. v. n. Sparks of fire falling from a frying pan (a good omen). …
n. m. Rus. Wom. Attention; mind ( dhiyān ).

(تاوه or تابه) s. m. 1. The iron plate on which bread is baked. 2. The part of a ḥuḳḳa to which the tobacco is fixed, or the tobacco itself. 3. An iron mirror. ¶ tauwā (dakh.) See تابه tāba. توي پوکي کهلي هونا tauwe po kī khillī honā (dakh.) To be unsettled or agitated.
subs: s.f. lit. 'A drop of water from off a baking-pan'; anything trifling or insignificant, a mere trifle; a transient or fleeting thing
s.m. The falling of sparks from a tawā (regarded as a good omen)
adj. lit. 'An inverted tawā'; coal-black, jet-black.
wety: From Sanskrit तापक (tāpaka). Cognate with Persian تابه (tâbe) and تاوه (tâve).

def: s.m. pl. (of tāběʻ, q.v.), Followers, dependants; &c.

ety: inf. n. of طوف 'to go or walk round,' &c.
def: s.f. Going round, turning; circumambulating; encompassing; making the circuit (of a holy place, as Mecca, &c.); pilgrimage
more: n. m. Making the circuit of Mecca or some other holy place. tavāf k. , v. a. To go round some holy place ( pirkrimā k .).
(from طوف) s. f. Turning, encompassing, pilgrimage, making the circuit of Mecca or of some other holy place.
subs: (-kī), To go round; to make the circuit (of a holy place).

ety: inf. n. vi of وفق 'to find (a thing) convenient,' &c.
def: s.m. Concord, harmony, agreement, concurrence, coincidence; (in Arith.) the relation between two numbers which have a common measure, commensurability.
more: (inf. vi. of وفق) s. m. 1. Concord, agreement, coincidence, concurrence. 2. (in arithmetick) The relation between two numbers which have a common divisor (as 6 and 8; both being divisible by 2).

ety: inf. n. v. of وهم 'to think, imagine,' &c.
def: s.m. Thinking, imagining, supposing; imagination, fancy, supposition, conjecture; suspicion; imputation.
more: (inf. v. of وهم) s. m. Suspicion, imputation, imagination, conjecture, fancy.

ety: inf. n. v of وحش 'to fly in terror'
def: s.m. Being desolate, being deserted (a city, &c.); feeling desolate or scared; flying (from), aversion, horror.
s.f. corr. of tabāhī, q.v. s.f. Ruin, wreck, destruction, perdition; wretchedness, misery; wickedness, depravity
subs: v.n. To experience misery; to be afflicted.

ety: pl. of t̤āʼifa, q.v.
def: s.f. Tribes, peoples, nations; troops, bands (particularly of dancing girls); — s.f. sing. A dancing girl.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian طَوَائِف (tawā'if), ultimately borrowed from Arabic طَوائِف (ṭawāʔif).

ety: inf. n. v of وجه 'to turn the face (to)'
def: s.f. Directing the steps (towards), turning (towards or to); countenancing, regarding, attending (to); inclination; regard; attention, consideration, countenance, favour, kindness, obligingness.
more: n. f. وجه turning the face to. 1. The act of turning towards; leaning; bent; inclination; bias. 2. Attention; consideration; application; care; regard. 3. Countenance; favor; patronage; condescension.

(inf. v. of وجه) s. f. 1. Turning, proceeding or undertaking a journey towards, countenancing, regarding, regard, attending to, attention, tendency. 2. Kindness, favour, obligingness. (Plur. توجـﮩ‍ات).
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَوَجُّه (tawajju), from Arabic تَوَجُّه (tawajjuh). First attested in c. 1657 as Middle Hindi توجہ (tvjh /⁠tavajjuh⁠/).

def: s.f. pl. (of tawajjǒh), Attentions, favours, kindnesses, &c.

ety: inf. n. vi of وجد 'to be transported'
def: s.m. Mutual ecstasy, rapture.
more: (inf. vi. of وجد q. v.) s. Mutual ecstacy, rapture.

ety: inf. n. v of وقع 'to fall'
def: s.f. Expectation, hope; trust, reliance; wish, desire; request
more: n. f. وقع alighting (birds). Hope ( ās , 2).
(inf. v. of وقوع) s. f. 1. Expectation, hope, desire, wish, trust, reliance. 2. Request. توقع رکهنا tawaḳḳuﻌ rakhnā, To expect, to hope.
subs: (-kī, of a thing, -se, from a person), To entertain or have hope, to hope; to expect, to look (for), to desire.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian توقع (tawaqqu'), from Arabic تَوَقُّع (tawaqquʕ).

ety: inf. n. v of وقف 'to stand, stop,' &c.
def: s.m. Stopping, pausing; pause, cessation; delay, suspension; hesitation; tediousness; patience
more: n. m. وقف standing; stopping. 1. Delay; respite; suspension; pause ( taammul ).
(inf. v. of وقف) s. m. Delay, pause, hesitation, cessation, tediousness; patience. توقف کرنا tawaḳḳuf karnā, To pause, hesitate, wait, delay, dally.
subs: v.n. To pause, hesitate, wait, delay, dally, &c.

ety: inf. n. v of وکل 'to entrust' (to), &c.
def: s.m. Trusting (to), depending (upon); trust in God; faith, reliance; resignation (to the Divine will)
more: n. m. وکل entrusting one's affairs to another. Trust in God; faith; resignation. tavakkul par baiṭhnā , v. n. 1. To trust in God; to hope for the best. 2. To do nothing; to sit idle.
(inf. v. of وکل) s. m. Trust in God, reliance, faith, resignation (to God).
subs: To rest in hope, to trust in God, to be resigned; to sit idle, to do nothing.

ety: inf. n. v of وقر 'to be mild,' &c.
def: s.m. Mildness, modesty, gentleness; sedateness, gravity; respect, dignity, honour.
more: (inf. v. of وقر) s. m. Respect, honour, modesty, mildness.

def: adv. Rapidly, fast, quick.
s.m. = taṅwālā, q.v. s.m. Darkness before the eyes, fainting, a swoon.

ety: prob. for A. t̤uwālat, fem. of t̤uwāl = t̤awīl; — or for t̤awīlat
def: s.f. Prolonging; length, protractedness; prolixity.

ety: inf. n. vi of ولي 'to be near or contiguous'
def: s.f. Following in succession; continuation, succession.
more: (inf. vi. of ولي) s. f. Continuation, succession.

def: s.m. = tāʼolā; utāwalā, q.v. adv. Rapidly, fast, quick.

ety: for A. tawallī, inf. n. v of ولي 'to be near,' &c.
def: s.m. Affection, attachment; cultivating friendship; hope.
more: (inf. v. of ولي) s. m. 1. Attachment, affection. 2. Hope.

ety: inf. n. v of ولد 'to bear children'
def: s.m. Birth, nativity; — adj. Born, generated
more: (inf. v. of ولد) 1. s. m. Birth, nativity. 2. adj. Born, generated. تولدهونا tawallud honā, To be born.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَوَلُّد (tawallud), from Arabic تَوَلُّد (tawallud).

def: Ped. v. n. To be born.

ety: inf. n. vi of ولد 'to bear children'
def: s.m. Begetting, being born generation after generation; propagation, generating again and again.
more: (inf. vi. of ولد) s. Begetting or being born generation after generation, propagating, generation.

def: s.m. A twin ( = joṛlā).
s.m. dual (of tauʼam), Twins (syn. joṛle).

ety: S. तर्पण, rt. तृप्
def: s.m. Satisfaction, compensation, amends, recompense, retaliation; penalty, forfeit, fine, mulct; fine for bloodshed (opp. to qiṣāṣ, q.v.); — debt; a loan
more: n. m. tāb power, ān price. 1. Penalty; forfeit; fine; damages. 2. Retaliation; compensation; atonement; satisfaction. 3. (In law) . The fine for dīat or bloodshed as distinguished from qisās retaliation. tāvān bāṅdhnā, tāvān lenā, yā lagānā , v. a. To fine; mulct; amerce. tāvān dilānā , v. a. To adjudge damages. tāvān denā , v. n. To pay a penalty or damages.

s. m. 1. Retaliation, recompense, amends. 2. Debt. 3. Fine, mulct. 4. Loan. (تاوان is used in opposition to قصاص ḳiṣāṣ, and means the price paid for blood). تاوان باندهنا يا لينا tāwān-bāndhnā or -lenā, To fine, to mulct. تاوان لگانا tāwān lagānā, To amerce.
subs: tāwān lagānā, tāwān lenā, v.n. To fine, mulct, amerce
(-ko), To cause compensation to be made, to adjudge damages
(-ko), To make amends, pay a penalty.

def: adj. See s.v. tawān. s.m. Satisfaction, compensation, amends, recompense, retaliation; penalty, forfeit, fine, mulct; fine for bloodshed (opp. to qiṣāṣ, q.v.); — debt; a loan
subs: tāwān lagānā, tāwān lenā, v.n. To fine, mulct, amerce
(-ko), To cause compensation to be made, to adjudge damages
(-ko), To make amends, pay a penalty.

def: adj. = tawāngar, q.v. adj. See s.v. tawān. s.m. Satisfaction, compensation, amends, recompense, retaliation; penalty, forfeit, fine, mulct; fine for bloodshed (opp. to qiṣāṣ, q.v.); — debt; a loan
subs: tāwān lagānā, tāwān lenā, v.n. To fine, mulct, amerce
(-ko), To cause compensation to be made, to adjudge damages
(-ko), To make amends, pay a penalty.

def: s.f. = tawāngarī, q.v.s.v. tawān.
s.f. Compensation, &c. ( = tāwān).
s. f. 1. Compensation. 2. Debt. 3. Fine. 4. Loan.
s.m. = taṅwar, and tomar, qq.v. s.m. Copper ( = tāṅbā, q.v.). s.m. Copper
more: n. m. S. तमर The name of a tribe among Rājpūts. Killī to ḍhillī bhaī, taṅvar bhaë mat-hīṅ .
subs: s.m. A copper rupee, a bad rupee
s.m. Sulphate of copper, blue vitriol.

def: s.m. See s.v. ta. s.m. A tail, the breast; the womb; the hip or flank; a warrior; a thief; a wicked man; an outcast, a barbarian; a jewel; nectar; a tree; — passing, crossing.
more: n. m. (Gram.) The त, or dental class of consonants; viz. त, थ, द, ध, न. .
( Gram .) The consonants of the ट or cerebral class, viz. ट ठ ड ढ ण. .

def: s.m. See s.v. ṭa. s.m. A tail, the breast; the womb; the hip or flank; a warrior; a thief; a wicked man; an outcast, a barbarian; a jewel; nectar; a tree; — passing, crossing.
s.f. pl. (of tārīḵẖ), Dates; chronicles, histories, annals.
more: n. f. pl. of تاريخ q. v. History; annals; chronicles.
s. (plur. of تاريخ) 1. Dates. 2. Histories, annals.

ety: inf. n. vi of ورد 'to enter'
def: s.m. Unintentionally inserting the sense of another's verses in one's own poems; — corresponding (by letter).
more: (inf. vi. of ورد or ورود) s. m. 1. Unintentionally inserting the sense of another in oneʼs own poems. 2. Corresponding by letter.

ety: inf. n. v of وسل not in use
def: s.m. Introduction (to another person; conjunction; copulation (cf wasīla).
more: n. m. Ped. for وسليه q. v.
(inf. v. of وسل) s. m. 1. Conjunction, copulation. 2. Introduction (to another person).

ety: inf. n. v of وسط 'to sit in the midst'
def: s.m. Mediation; introduction; middle-man, mediator, umpire.
more: (inf. v. of وسط) s. m. 1. Mediation. 2. Introduction; also, a mediator, or introducer.

def: adj. & adv. So great; so much, so many; such; so far, so long; — so greatly, to such an extent; until.

ety: inf. n. v of وطن 'to dwell, abide'
def: s.m. Fixing one's residence (in a place or country), taking up one's abode (in); residence.
more: (inf. v. of وطن) s. m. Fixing oneʼs residence in a country, residence.

ety: inf. n. vi of وتر 'to separate,' &c.
def: s.m. Following in succession; succession, continuation.
more: (inf. vi. of وتر) s. m. Continuation, succession.

def: n. f. pl. of طايفه A dancing girl. Kasbī jo tavāyaf koi ho jātī hai buṛhyā, Phir 'jān,' kahāne se woh sharmātī hai buṛhyā, Sir dhuntī hai, uktātī hai, ghabrātī hai buṛhyā, Din rāt isī soch meṅ gam khātī hai buṛhyā, Yeh dard wohi jāne jo ho jātī hai buṛhyā . Nazīr. The fille de joie become a woman old, Call her 'my love,' shame feels the woman old, Each word and deed doth shame the woman old, She beats her head, heart-sore the woman old, Such griefs known only to the woman old! tavāyaf-ul-mulūkī , n. f. Anarchy. tavāyaf h. , v. n. 1. To be deflowered. 2. To become a prostitute.
more: s. f. plur. (of طايفه) People, nations, troops, bands (particularly, of dancing girls).

ety: inf. n. vi of وضع 'to place, lay down'
def: s.f. Humility; attention, civility, courtesy; hospitality, reception, entertainment; gift, present; pretended kindness, empty compliments
more: n. f. وضع form. 1. Affability; attentions; civility. 2. An entertainment; a reception; hospitality. 3. A gift; present. tavāzo-i-Samarqandī , False politeness; empty compliments. tavāzo-i-Shīrāz , n. f. Simple fare; homely diet. tavāzo k . v. a. To entertain; receive with all politeness. 2. To present; offer.
(inf. vi. of وضع) s. f. Humility, attention, civility, pretended kindness, empty compliments. تواضع سمرقندي tawāẓuﻌ-i-samarḳandī, False politeness, pretended kindness, empty compliment.
subs: (-kī), To treat with civility or courtesy, to receive with politeness; to entertain; to offer (a thing) as a present, to make a present (to).

ety: inf. n. v. of وضأ 'to excel in cleanliness,' &c.'
def: s.f. Performing ablutions before prayer; arriving at the age of puberty (boys or girls) when ablution must be performed.
more: (inf. v. of وضأ or وضوٴ) s. f. 1. Performing the ablution before prayer. 2. Arriving at the age of puberty when ablution must be performed.

ety: inf. n. ii of عوق 'to hinder; to cleave (to)'
def: s.f. Hindering, preventing; averting; delaying; suspending, suspension.
more: (inf. ii. of عوق) s. f. Suspending, suspension, preventing, delaying, averting.

ety: inf. n. ii of اول 'to revert,' &c.
def: s.f. Explanation, exposition, elucidation, interpretation; paraphrase; turning (language) from the obvious meaning, interpreting in a manner not according to the obvious meaning
more: n. f. اول interpreting. 1. Interpretation; elucidation; explanation. 2. False argument; idle excuse. Miyāṅ, tum yuṅhī tāvīleṅ kīyā karte ho .
(inf. ii. of اول) s. f. Explanation, elucidation, interpretation, paraphrase.
subs: (-kī), To explain, &c.; to interpret (verses, dreams, &c.); to turn (language) from the obvious meaning.

ety: v.n. fr. طول 'to be or become long'; see t̤ūl
def: adj. Long; tall; prolix; diffuse.
more: adj. 1. Long. 2. ( tūl tavīl ) Prolix; diffuse.
(from طول) adj. Long, tall, prolix, diffuse.

ety: for A. طويلة, fem. of t̤awīl, q.v.
def: s.m. A long rope with which cattle are tied; a tether, foot-band, fetter; — a stable, stall.
more: n. m. A stall; stable. 1. Kauṛī na ho to phir yeh jhamelā kahāṅ se ho, Rath-khāna, fil-khāna, tavelā kahāṅ se ho? Nazir. Without the pence to spend whence all this pomp and show displayed? Your carriage, horses, elephants, a numerous cavalcade! 2. Aise tavele meṅ bandhte haiṅ! Mazāq. Jest. Such fellows are tethered in stables.
(from طول) s. m. 1. A long rope with which cattle are tied, a tether, foot-band, fetter; hence, 2. (vulg. t̤awela ) A stable, a stall.

ety: inf. n. ii of عوذ 'to seek protection'
def: s.m. Praying for protection or preservation (by invoking God, or by uttering some charm), having recourse to God; — a charm, an amulet, a phylactery; a magic square; a structure of brick or stone work over a grave; a tombstone.
more: n. m. عوذ fleeing for refuge. 1. An amulet; a charm; a magic square ( jantr ). 2. A stone placed over a grave; a tombstone.
(inf. ii. of عوذ) s. m. 1. Having recourse to the deity, asking protection. 2. A charm, an amulet.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَعْوِیذ (ta'wīz), borrowed from Arabic تَعْوِيذ (taʕwīḏ).

ety: S. तात+कः
def: s.m. Paternal uncle ( = tāʼū, q.v.). s.m. Father's elder brother, paternal uncle; — an elder, superior; — an astute fellow, a knave.
more: Mah. n. m. See تاو tā'yasrā , n. m. tāyas , n. f. Father-in-law's elder brother.
wety: Inherited from Middle Hindi تایا (taya /⁠tāyā⁠/) (c. 1435), from Sanskrit *तातिय (*tātiya) / तात्य (tātyá). Cognate with Punjabi تایْا (tāyā) / ਤਾਇਆ (tāiā).

def: s.m. = tawā; and taʼī, qq.v.
more: n. f. 1. A small kauṛī . 2. Pudendum muliebre ( ṭanā ). Kauṛī ajab chhināl hai, ṭaīyāṅ marāonī, Kauṛī ne chhāë dī hai Firangī kī chhāonī . Suthre shāhī. Money's a bawd inconstant, always changing hands, 'Tis money takes the Englishman to foreign lands.

ety: inf. n. v of يقن 'to know for certain'
def: s.m. Knowing for certain, ascertaining; ascertainment; certainty (cf. yaqīn).
more: (inf. v. of يقن) s. m. Ascertaining, ascertainment, certainty.

ety: inf. n. v of يقظ 'to wake, be watchful'
def: s.m. Waking, watchfulness, vigilance; lucubration.
more: (inf. v. of يقظ Heb. ) s. Watchfulness, vigilance, waking.

ety: inf. n. v of ام 'to betake oneself (to)'
def: s.m. lit. 'Betaking oneself to dust, to wipe the face and hands and arms therewith, for prayer'; purifying or rubbing the hands, face, and other parts of the body before prayer, with sand or dust, where water cannot be had.
more: n. m. يم the ocean. Purifying the hands, face, or other parts of the body by rubbing them with sand or dust, where water is not to be had, for the purpose of purificatory ablution.
(inf. v. of يمّ) s. m. Purifying before prayer with sand or dust, when water cannot be had.
wety: From Arabic تَيَمُّم (tayammum).

ety: S. तार्क्ष्य+रः; or तर्तरीकः, rt. तॄ
def: s.m. = H ٿايري टायरी tāyarī, ṭāʼerī, s.f. A horse; a hack.
n. m. ṭāërī , n. f. A hack.

ety: inf. n. of طير 'to fly'
def: s.m. Flying, flight (of birds, &c.).

ety: S. तार्क्ष्य+रः; or तर्तरीकः, rt. तॄ
def: s.m. A horse; a hack.

ety: see next
def: s.f. The wife of a father-in-law's elder brother.

ety: S. तात+श्वशुरकः
def: s.m. Father-in-law's elder brother.

ety: rt. of tāḵẖtan; see tāḵẖt
def: adj. Running, hastening, &c. (used in comp.); — s.f. Running, race; — assault, attack, invasion (cf. tāzī)
more: 1. part. act. (from تاختن) in compos. Running, hastening. 2. s. Assault, attack, race, running. تازوتگ tāz o tag, Toil and labour.
subs: s.f. Labour and exertion, toil and trouble (syn. dauṛ-dhūp).

ety: fr. taz; Zend taćañtan, rt. tać = S. तञ्च्
def: adj. (f. -ī), Fresh, new, recent; young, tender; raw, green; fat, plump, in good condition; well-off, prosperous; blooming; pleased, happy
more: adj. 1. Fresh; new; recent; latest. 1. Tāzī khabar . 2. Koī kahe, 'Bābū, idhar ko āo, dekho chīz kyā khāsī, Tājī lo to haigī yāṅ par, aur vāṅ par hai bāsī .' E. Fish-sellers' cry. Some cry, 'this way, Sir, look, what nice ones here are set! If fresh you want they're here, there only stale you'll get.' 2. Green; young; tender. 3. Well-off; prosperous; happy. Tāzā dam. tāzā dam honā , v. n. To be refreshed; to acquire new strength. tāzā karnā , v. a. 1. To renew; renovate; restore; refresh; recreate. 2. To freshen; make fresh; renew. Huqqā tāzā karnā . 3. To revive; cheer. tāzā-vilāyat , n. m. A new-comer; foreigner; green-horn.

adj. 1. Fresh, new; afresh, anew. 2. Fat. 3. Young, green, tender, raw. 4. Happy, pleased. تازه کرنا tāza karnā, To renew, to refresh, to recreate. تازه هونا tāza honā, To be in good case, to increase, to flourish. تازه بتازه tāza-ba-tāza, adj. Fresh and blooming. تازه خيال tāza-ḵẖiyāl, Imagining what is new or fresh, an inventor. تازه دم tāza-dam, s. m. Good spirits, hilarity, cheerfulness. تازه کار tāza-kār, Making fresh or anew; beginner, renewer. تازه کاري tāza-kār-ī, s. f. Fresh or new work, new building. تازه وارد tāza wārid, New comer.
subs: adj. Fresh and plump; young and strong
adj. & s.m. Imagining something fresh or new; — an inventor
s.m. Fresh strength; good spirits, hilarity, cheerfulness; — tāza-dam honā, v.n. To gain fresh strength, be refreshed; to be in good spirits, &c.
adj. & s.m. Making fresh, making anew; — beginner; renewer
s.f. Fresh or new work; new building
v.t. To make fresh, freshen, refresh, recreate; to renew, renovate, restore
s.m. New comer, stranger, foreigner; — simpleton, green-horn
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَازَه (tāza).

ety: inf. n. ii of ذبذب 'to put in motion,' &c.
def: s.m. Commotion, agitation, palpitation; wavering, vacillation; suspension of judgment; perplexity; ambiguity.
more: n. m. ذبذب wavering. See تامل 2, 3.
(inf. ii. of ذبذب) s. Agitation, commotion, palpitation; vacillation, suspension of judgment, ambiguity.

ety: inf. n. vi of ضدّ 'to overcome'
def: s.m. Contrariety, opposition, contradiction; inconsistency, absurdity.
more: (inf. vi. of ضدّ) s. m. Contradiction, contrariety, absurdity, inconsistency.

ety: abst. s. from next
def: s.f. Freshness, newness, novelty; renewal, renovation, revival; fatness, plumpness, good condition; tenderness; greenness; pleasure.
more: n. f. 1. Renovation; renewal; restoration; revival. 2. Freshness; newness. 3. Greenness; tenderness.
(from تازه) s. f. 1. Freshness, newness. 2. Plumpness, fatness. 3. Tenderness, greenness. 4. Pleasure.

ety: inf. n. v of ظلم 'to act tyrannically'
def: s.m. Complaining of the wrong-doing, injustice, or tyranny (of anyone); groaning under oppression; injus tice, injury, oppression.
more: (inf. v. of ظلم) s. m. Groaning under oppression, complaining of injustice, injustice, injury, oppression.

ety: inf. n. ii of زلزل 'to shake,' &c.
def: s.m. Being shaken, being or becoming in a state of motion; commotion, agitation, trepidation; an earthquake; — swerving (from the path of rectitude); discrepancy (in a deposition, &c.); defalcation.
more: (inf. ii. of زلزلة) s. m. 1. Commotion, agitation, trepidation. 2. An earthquake.

ety: inf. n. v. of ضرع 'to be humbled,' &c.
def: s.m. Self-abasement, humility; earnest supplication; complaining, lamenting.
more: (inf. v. of ضرع) s. m. 1. Suppli. cation. 2. Lamenting.

def: s.m. = tadarv, q.v. s.m. A cock pheasant, a pheasant (to whose gait that of a mistress is compared).

ety: inf. n. v of زوج
def: s.m. = A تزويج tazwīj [inf. n. ii of زوج 'to pair'], s.f. Marrying, taking a partner or wife.

ety: inf. n. vi of زيد 'to increase'
def: s.m. Increasing; increase, augmentation.
more: (inf. vi. of زيادت) s. m. Increase.

ety: P. tāzī+Prk.इल्लओ = S. इल+कः
def: s.m. A tāzī or Arab colt.

ety: inf. n. ii of ذهب
def: s.f. The art of gilding; illumination (of manuscripts).

ety: inf. n. ii of ضحك 'to laugh'
def: s.f. Laughing at, mocking; ridicule, derision.
more: (inf. ii. of ضحک Heb. He laughed) s. f. Mocking, derision, ridicule.

def: s.f. contract. of the next, q.v.
more: (inf. ii. of ضيع) s. f. Spoiling, wasting, idling (away time). تضيع اوقات taẓī-iﻌ-auḳāt, Idling away time; ennui, weariness.

r: tāzī, tāz, lit, tāzī zabān, tāzī-ḵẖāna
ety: rel. n. from tāz, q.v.
def: s.m. Dog-kennel
more: n. m. تاختن to run at. 1. The Arabic language, so called as the language of the invaders. 2. An Arab horse or dog. Turkī piṭe, tāzī kāṅpe . Prov. The Turk beaten, the Arab trembles. (The punishment of one is a warning to others). tāzī-khānā . A dog-kennel.
1. adj. Arabian, or Arabic; Arabian (horse). تازي کتا tāzī-kuttā, A greyhound. تازي خانه tāzī-ḵẖāna, A dog-kennel. 2. s. f. For تازکي tāza-gī, Newness, &c.

ety: inf. n. ii of عذب
def: s.f. Punishment; torture.

ety: inf. n. ii of ضعف 'to be weak'
def: s.f. Folding over; doubling.
more: (inf. ii. of ضعف) s. f. Doubling.

ety: tāzī+k = S. क
def: s.m. A man or a horse of Arab blood born and brought up in another country; a horse of mixed breed.
more: s. m. 1. A horse of mixed breed. 2. An Arabian colt which has grown up in some other country.

ety: inf. n. ii of عزل 'to set aside, to remove'
def: s.f. Removing or deposing (from office), displacing.
more: (inf. ii. of عزل) s. f. Removing or deposing from an office.

ety: inf. n. v of عظم
def: s.f. Magnifying, honouring, treating with respect, reverence, or veneration; honour, respect, reverence; geniality, politeness
more: n. f. عظم became great. Respect. See اُدر 2.
(inf. ii. of عظم) s. f. Reverence, respect, honour, treating with ceremony and respect, honouring, gentility, politeness. تعظيم کرني taﻌz̤īm ḳarnī, To honour, to reverence, to shew respect.
subs: (-kī), To show respect (to), to honour, respect, or reverence.

def: (inf. ii. of زينت) s. f. Dressing oneʼs self, decoration, ornament, honour, jewel.

ety: inf. n. ii of عذر
def: s.f. Making an excuse, apologizing; excuse, subterfuge. (Rare.)
more: (inf. ii. of عذر) s. f. Apologizing, subterfuge, excuse. (Little used).

ety: inf. n. ii of عزر 'to beat, to punish'
def: s.f. Punishment, correction, reproof, censure, reprimand.
more: (inf. ii. of عزر) s. f. Punishment, correction, reproof, censure, reprimand.

ety: i.q. taʻziyat, q.v.
def: s.m. A representation of the shrines of Hasan and Husain, sons of 'Alī (which is carried in procession at the Moḥarram by the Shīʻas chiefly)
more: n. m. 1. A model of a tomb of Hasan and Husain at Karbala , carried in procession at the Moharram by the Indian Shīās chiefly. 2. ( Fac .) A shop; building; factory. Hin. taziya-dārī , n. f. 1. The act of making a tāziya . 2. Observing the Muharram. tāziya ṭhanḍā h. , v. n. 1. To be buried (a taziya ). 2. To be bankrupt, beggared, ruined.

(from عزي) s. m. 1. See تعزيت taﻌziyat. 2. It is become the name of the representation of the tomb of Hasan and Husain, which is thrown into the river at the anniversary of the muḥarram. تعزيه خانه taﻌziya-ḵẖāna, s. m. The place of taﻌziya. تعزيه دار يا گير taﻌziya-dār or -gīr, One who observes the mourning in muḥarram: and, تعزيه داري taﻌziya-dār-ī, s. f. The observance of it. تعزيه لينا taﻌziya lenā, To observe the mourning during the muḥarram, to go into mourning.
subs: To bury a taʻziya, to throw a taʻziya into the river (at the anniversary of the Moḥarram)
s.m. The place of the taʻziya
taʻziya-gīr, s.m. One who observes the mourning in Moḥarram
s.f. Making a taʻziya; the observance of Moḥarram
v.n. To observe the mourning during Moḥarram, to go into mourning.
wety: Borrowed from Arabic تَعْزِيَة (taʕziya).

ety: S. ताड+य+P. aff. āna
def: s.m. A whip, scourge; flogging, corporal punishment
more: n. m. 1. A whip; scourge. 2. Flogging; corporal punishment.
s. m. A whip, a scourge. تازيانه جڙنا يا لگانا يا مارنا tāziyāna-jaṛnā or -lagānā or -mārnā, v. a. To scourge.
subs: tāziyāna lagānā, tāziyāna mārnā, v.t. To lay the whip on, to flog, to scourge.

ety: for A. تعزية, inf. n. ii of عزي 'to endure patiently'
def: s.f. Consoling; condolence; lamentation, mourning
more: n. f. عزي he enjoined patience. 1. Condolence. 2. Lamentation; mourning. tāziyat-nāma , n. m. A letter of condolence.
(inf. ii. of عزي) s. f. Condolence, lamentation, mourning. تعزيت نامه taﻌziyat-nāma, s. m. Letter of condolence.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian تَعْزِیَت (ta'ziyat), from Arabic تَعْزِيَة (taʕziya).

def: adj. لر Piquant; delicious; haut gout .
more: (from لذّ) adj. Delicious, pleasant, delightful, luscious, sweet, savoury, nice.

def: n. m. ذکر remembering. See zikr . Biography; memoirs; life.

ety: inf. n. ii of ذکر
def: s.f. Bringing to memory; mentioning, recording; commemoration; exhortation, admonition; — making masculine; the masculine gender.
more: (inf. ii. of ذکر) s. f. 1. Masculine gender. 2. Commemoration, bringing to memory, mentioning, recording, admonishing.

ety: for A. تذکرة, inf. n. ii of ذکر 'to remember'
def: s.f. Memoirs of eminent men.
more: (inf. ii. of ذکر) s. m. 1. Memory, remembrance. 2. A memoir, billet, schedule, obligation, handwriting. 3. Biographical memoirs (especially, of poets).

ety: for A. تذکرة, inf. n. ii of ذکر 'to remember'
def: s.f. Memoirs of eminent men.

ety: prop. تذکرةً, acc. of taẕkirat
def: adv. By way of reminding; by way of mention; by way of memoir.

ety: for A. تزکية tazkiyat, fem.
def: s.m. Purifying; causing to grow, thrive, or increase; purification.

ety: inf. n. ii of ذل 'to be base,' &c.
def: s.f. Debasing, degrading, humiliating; bringing under subjection; debasement, abasement, humiliation; depression.
more: (inf. ii. of ذلت) s. f. Abasement, debasement, depression.

ety: inf. n. ii of ضمن 'to be responsible,' &c.
def: s.f. Taking (one) as a surety or guarantee; giving security; giving satisfaction (for an injury); entrusting (a thing, &c.) with another; lending on interest; causing (a thing) to be comprehended or contained (in another); comprehending or including (one thing in another); putting or depositing (a thing) in (a receptacle); inserting or introducing a verse or two (of another poet) into one's own poem (to complete, or to corroborate, the meaning intended, — notifying it, however, as borrowed)
more: (inf. ii. of ضمن) s. f. 1. Giving satisfaction for an injury. 2. Comprehending or including one thing in another. 3. Inserting the verses of another in oneʼs own poem. 4. Giving security. 5. Intrusting with another. 6. Lending on interest. 7. Putting in a purse or strong box. تضمين کرنا taẓmīn karnā, To insert the verses of another in oneʼs own poem, making the one correspond with the other.
subs: v.t. To insert a verse or two (of another poet) in one's own poem, &c.

ety: inf. n. ii of زوج 'to pair'
def: s.f. = A تزوج tazawwuj [inf. n. v of زوج], s.m. Marrying, taking a partner or wife.

ety: inf. n. ii of زور; but prob. from zūr, 'falsehood'
def: s.f. Falsifying; falsehood, lie; deception, deceit, fraud, imposture, stratagem.
more: (inf. ii. of زور) s. f. Imposture, fraud, deceit, stratagem, deception, lie.

ety: inf. n. ii of ضيع 'to perish'
def: s.f. Causing to perish, destroying, spoiling, wasting, idling away (time)
subs: s.f. Idling away time; ennui, weariness.

ety: inf. n. ii of زين 'to adorn'
def: s.f. Adorning, decorating, dressing (oneself); decoration, ornament, jewel; honour.
